input.background: We calculate $90 \%$ and $95 \%$ confidence intervals for the $R R$ for the estrogen trial illustrative data. Table $\mathbf{1 7 . 3}$ shows the data. We established that $\widehat{R R}=\frac{\hat{p}_1}{\hat{p}_2}=\frac{0.08829}{0.07689}=1.1483$.
input.question: Calculate the natural logarithm of the estimated relative risk ($\ln(\widehat{R R})$).

output.method: 数学计算 -> 获取模型参数估计值

Cases_Estrogen_Plus.description: Number of cases in the group receiving estrogen.

Noncases_Estrogen_Plus.description: Number of non-cases in the group receiving estrogen.

Total_Estrogen_Plus.description: Total number of participants in the group receiving estrogen.

Cases_Estrogen_Minus.description: Number of cases in the group not receiving estrogen.

Noncases_Estrogen_Minus.description: Number of non-cases in the group not receiving estrogen.

Total_Estrogen_Minus.description: Total number of participants in the group not receiving estrogen.

Estimated_RR.description: Estimated relative risk calculated from the data.

Log_Estimated_RR.description: Natural logarithm of the estimated relative risk.

meta_info.caption: Confidence interval for the relative risk (Estrogen  trial).
